# rh-ssg-release-notes

Red Hat SSG review for release notes: tense rules (present by default, past
for "before this update"), informative headings (sentence case, no gerunds,
under 120 chars), Jira references on known/fixed issues, AsciiDoc formatting
(description lists, `+` attachment), and release-note types — new features,
enhancements, rebases (X.Y.Z), Technology Preview, deprecated/removed
features, known issues (Cause > Consequence > Workaround > Result), and fixed
issues (CCFR pattern). Checklist-driven, no CLI arguments; composed by
`docs-review-style` for `.adoc` release notes.

**Plugin**: [docs-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
Review these release notes for Red Hat SSG compliance
```
